live_data_status.note: Cloud sandbox cannot reach Railway directly (egress proxy refuses CONNECT — the 'endpoint 403'). GitHub Actions relays production state every 30 min (market hours) to the live-snapshot branch.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal-reconfirmed hold extension: at max_hold (390 bars), if the ticker would qualify as a FRESH entry right now (lgbm_pred_return > dynamic cost threshold AND dir_prob >= 0.60), extend the hold one more day instead of exiting — equivalent to a re-entry without paying the round-trip spread. Hard caps: max 2 extensions (3 days absolute), stops/trail/target always active, extension NEVER allowed if position is at a loss > 1x daily vol.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase holdext (4 variants: max_ext∈{1,2} × loss_gate_mult∈{1.0,2.0}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_status: MERGED — in production (v0.4.4). Backtest phase in PR #9 (DRAFT).
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Highest Railway backtest priority: owner-requested, strongest live evidence base (5W/4L max_hold cohort). Backtest phase PR #9 correctly held as DRAFT.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: SPY/QQQ regime overlay (only deploy full heat when SPY > 20d MA) improves Sharpe by cutting down-tape exposure
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase spy_ma (4 variants: MA period∈{10d,20d} × action∈{gate,half}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_status: MERGED — in production (v0.4.2). Backtest phase in PR #10 (DRAFT).
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Conservative risk reduction; clean mechanism. Backtest phase PR #10 correctly held as DRAFT.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Cross-sectional daily top-k ranking (long top 3-4 by LGBM pred at 14:00 ET, exit next day) beats per-ticker threshold entries
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase topk (4 variants: k∈{3,4} × snapshot∈{13:00,14:00 ET}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — held pending Railway backtest; freeze intact
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Largest architectural change; backtest required before merge. Correctly held as DRAFT.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Earnings-calendar blackout (no entries within 2 days of earnings) removes uncompensated gap risk on 1-day holds
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py (phase TBD); report Sharpe/PF/win-rate/drawdown/n per leg, plus lost-opportunity cost (trades skipped)
hypothesis_queue.pr_status: MERGED — in production (v0.4.4). No dedicated backtest phase PR yet.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Risk reduction hypothesis; outcome uncertain (may remove alpha). Validate H5 and H2 first, then run opportunity-cost analysis.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Signal persistence filter: require N consecutive qualifying bars (pred_return > threshold AND dir_prob > dead_hi) before allowing a position entry. Filters noise at the cost of some delayed entries.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase persistence (N ∈ {0, 1, 2, 3}; N=0 is exactly current baseline); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — held pending Railway backtest; freeze intact
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: New noise-reduction hypothesis. Correctly held as DRAFT. Validate H5/H2 first — those are deployed and burning live sample. Lower priority than H1.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Stagnation exits are dead code in production (SIZING_STAGNATION_BARS == SIZING_MAX_HOLD_BARS = 390, so max_hold always fires first on flat trades). Re-enabling stagnation at 50/67/80% of max_hold frees capital from flat trades earlier. Bonus: PROD_PARAMS establishes the first production-comparable backtest baseline.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase stagnation (stag_bars ∈ {390 disabled=baseline, 195 50%, 260 67%, 312 80%}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — held pending Railway backtest; freeze intact. PROD_PARAMS is read-only reference constant — no behavior change until explicitly used.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: PROD_PARAMS baseline is the most intellectually honest addition this week — gives Railway worker a production-comparable floor. Stagnation exit is a reasonable optimization but unvalidated. Correctly held as DRAFT.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Removing dead ensemble weights (Transformer/TCN contribute 0.0 in every live trade) and renormalizing LGBM 60->75, sentiment 20->25 sharpens the entry signal
hypothesis_queue.test: IC comparison of reweighted ensemble on validation window
hypothesis_queue.pr_status: MERGED — commit 16051d4. In production (v0.4.4). No dedicated backtest phase PR.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Calibration fix already in production; IC delta confirmation is useful but not blocking. Lowest Railway backtest priority.
